title: genista pilosa subsp. jordanii
intro: Genista pilosa subsp. jordanii, also known as Jordan's broom or broom thorn, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the legume family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Genista pilosa subsp. jordanii is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
